---
title: "Publications"
description: "Published papers, ongoing work, and collaborations by Shunyu Wu across optimization, forecasting, and quantitative modeling."
keywords:
  - Shunyu Wu publications
  - shunyuwu publications
  - 吴舜禹 论文
  - optimization
  - forecasting
  - quantitative modeling
toc: false
---

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@graph": [
    {
      "@type": "ScholarlyArticle",
      "name": "End-to-End Stochastic Predict-Then-Optimize for Cost-Efficient Water-Energy Resource Scheduling",
      "datePublished": "2025",
      "url": "https://doi.org/10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238"
    },
    {
      "@type": "ScholarlyArticle",
      "name": "Knowledge-based Bi-correction model for achieving effective lag-free characteristic on daily urban water demand forecasting",
      "datePublished": "2024",
      "url": "https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508"
    },
    {
      "@type": "ScholarlyArticle",
      "name": "CritiCoder: An End-to-End Uncertain Regression Network for Robust Macroscopic Pressure Models in Water Distribution Systems",
      "datePublished": "2023",
      "url": "https://doi.org/10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330"
    }
  ]
}
</script>

::: {.section-note}
This list is synchronized with the dissertation achievement section and public scholarly profiles. Status is explicitly separated into **Published**, **Current Manuscripts**, and **Collaborations** to avoid ambiguity.
:::

Recurring themes across these papers include **optimization**, **forecasting**, **system modeling**, and **quantitative decision methods**.

## Citation Profiles

- Google Scholar: [Shunyu Wu profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=keb-zTsAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN&oi=ao)
- ResearchGate: [Shunyu Wu profile](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Shunyu-Wu?ev=hdr_xprf)
- ORCID record: [0000-0001-9856-2148](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9856-2148)
- CV bundle with publication list: [CV page](/cv/)

## At a Glance

- 3 first-author published journal papers
- 5 first-author manuscripts in submitted, under-review, or in-preparation stages
- 6 selected collaboration papers across journals and conference proceedings

## Published (First-Author)

1. [End-to-End Stochastic Predict-Then-Optimize for Cost-Efficient Water-Energy Resource Scheduling](2025-tsg-water-energy.qmd)  
IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid, 2025. DOI: [10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238](https://doi.org/10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238)
2. [Knowledge-based Bi-correction Model for Lag-free Daily Urban Water Demand Forecasting](2024-eswa-water-demand.qmd)  
Expert Systems with Applications, 2024. DOI: [10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2024.124508)
3. [CritiCoder: End-to-End Uncertain Regression for Robust Macroscopic Pressure Models in WDN](2023-tcss-criticoder.qmd)  
IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems, 2023. DOI: [10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330](https://doi.org/10.1109/TCSS.2023.3272330)

## Ongoing Work (Submitted / Under Review / In Preparation)

1. [Planning the Invisible: End-to-End Sensor Deployment Regret Minimization for Anomaly-Aware Water Networks](2026-aaai-sensor.qmd)  
Water Research, submitted (2026).
2. [Learning as Energy Dissipation: Handling Inexact Surrogate Gradients in Decision-Focused Training](2025-neurips-proximal.qmd)  
IEEE/CAA Journal of Automatica Sinica, submitted (2025).
3. [Crossing the Separation Point: Stabilizing Decision-Focused Training with Recursive Variational Free-Energy](2025-neurips-vfe.qmd)  
ICML, under review (2026).
4. [FENCE: Feasibility-ENforced Constrained nEural Solver for End-to-End Constrained Optimization](2026-inprep-envelope.qmd)  
ICML, under review (2026).
5. [Beyond Objective Parameters: Parametric Dual-Gap Regret for Predict-then-Optimize under Unknown Constraint Parameters](2026-iclr-dual-gap.qmd)  
In preparation (2026).

## Collaborations (Selected Published / Proceedings)

1. [Reinforcement Learning Controller Design for Discrete-Time-Constrained Nonlinear Systems With Weight Initialization Method](2024-tsmc-rl-controller.qmd)  
IEEE TSMC: Systems, 2024. DOI: [10.1109/TSMC.2023.3344883](https://doi.org/10.1109/TSMC.2023.3344883)
2. [Adaptive Dynamic Programming for Optimal Control of Discrete-Time Nonlinear Systems With Trajectory-Based Initial Control Policy](2024-tsmc-adp-trajectory.qmd)  
IEEE TSMC: Systems, 2024. DOI: [10.1109/TSMC.2023.3327450](https://doi.org/10.1109/TSMC.2023.3327450)
3. [Prediction of Energy Consumption in Horizontal Roughing Process of Hot Rolling Strip Based on TDADE Algorithm](2023-tase-tdade.qmd)  
IEEE TASE, 2024. DOI: [10.1109/TASE.2023.3236306](https://doi.org/10.1109/TASE.2023.3236306)
4. [A Novel Series-Concatenation Hybrid Prediction Model of Energy Consumption in Hot Strip Roughing Process With Multi-Step Rolling](2024-tase-series-concat.qmd)  
IEEE TASE, 2024. DOI: [10.1109/TASE.2023.3299185](https://doi.org/10.1109/TASE.2023.3299185)
5. [Adaptive Optimal Control of Nonlinear Systems with Multiple Time-Scale Eligibility Traces](2023-cdc-eligibility-traces.qmd)  
CDC, 2023. DOI: [10.1109/CDC49753.2023.10383316](https://doi.org/10.1109/CDC49753.2023.10383316)
6. [The CEEMDAN-ps-gcGRU Model on Water Pressure Prediction With Strong Irregularity](2023-ifac-gcgru.qmd)  
IFAC-PapersOnLine, 2023. DOI: [10.1016/j.ifacol.2023.10.581](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ifacol.2023.10.581)
